name: kn-scientists-backend
description: Local LLM backend for the Kerr-Newman Lab 'Scientists' page. Roleplays famous physicists/astronomers over an Ollama-served model on an RTX 3060. Cleanly isolated from the static browser demo; talks to the frontend only through a small REST/SSE API.
author: Chang Wei Lin

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check config.mjs && node --check lib/ollama.mjs && node --check lib/model-resolver.mjs && node --check lib/context.mjs && node --check lib/sessions.mjs && node --check personas/scientists.mjs && node --check knowledge/wiki.mjs && node --check knowledge/build-finetune-dataset.mjs
